name: Enumerate SES for Phishing Capability
description: Simulates an attacker probing AWS SES to assess phishing capability: checks sending limits, verified identities, and account sending status. Multiple read APIs called in rapid succession reveal the attacker's intent to abuse email infrastructure.
prerequisites: None — reads existing SES configuration in the account
detection_signal: Multiple SES read APIs (ses:GetAccountSendingEnabled, ses:GetSendQuota, ses:ListIdentities, ses:GetIdentityVerificationAttributes) called in rapid succession from unexpected principals
